menu.failedToAdd: Failed to add item to cart

cart.title: Your Cart
cart.errorItemUnavailable: Some items are no longer available. Please review your cart.
cart.errorSessionInactive: Your table session has ended. Please scan the QR code again.
cart.errorRateLimited: Too many orders. Please wait a moment before ordering again.
cart.errorOrderInProgress: Your order is already being placed. Please wait.
cart.errorPriceChanged: Prices were updated while you were ordering. Your new total is {total}. Please review your cart and tap Place Order again.
cart.errorPriceChangedNoTotal: Prices were updated while you were ordering. Please review your cart and tap Place Order again.
cart.errorCartChanged: Some items were removed from your cart because they are no longer on the menu. Please review your cart and tap Place Order again.
cart.errorOptionUnavailable: An option you selected is no longer available and was removed from your cart. Please review your cart and tap Place Order again.
cart.failedToAddItem: Couldn't add item. Please try again.
cart.confirmRemoveItem: Are you sure you want to remove this item from your cart?
cart.hasUnavailableItems: Some items are no longer available. Remove them to place your order.

order.confirmAllPartial: {failed} of {total} orders could not be confirmed. Please try again.
order.confirmRemoveItem: Are you sure you want to remove "{name}" from this order?
order.confirmDecline: Decline this order? This cannot be undone.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.showQr: Show this QR code at the counter
checkout.thankYouMessage: Your bill has been settled. We hope you enjoyed your meal!
checkout.downloadError: Couldn't create the receipt image. Please try again.

customer.welcomeSubtitle: Browse our menu and place your order.
customer.invalidTableMessage: This QR code is invalid or the table is no longer active. Please ask staff for assistance.
customer.noSessionMessage: Please scan the QR code on your table to start ordering.
customer.sessionExpiredMessage: Your session is no longer active. Please scan the QR code again.
customer.step1Desc: Find the QR code on your table and scan it with your phone camera.
customer.step2Desc: Explore our dishes, view descriptions and prices, then add items to your cart.
customer.step3Desc: Review your cart and place your order. The kitchen will start preparing right away.
customer.step4Desc: Track your order status in real time. Show the checkout QR to staff when ready to pay.
customer.scanHint: Point your camera at the QR code on your table

login.subtitle: Admin Dashboard
login.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
login.rateLimited: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.

setup.title: Welcome
setup.subtitle: Let's set up your restaurant in two quick steps.
setup.accountSubtitle: This will be the first SUPERADMIN account.
setup.restaurantSubtitle: You can change all of this later in Settings.
setup.permanentNotice: Currency can't be changed after setup. The language you pick now becomes the permanent fallback for saved records — you can still change the display language later.
setup.confirmFinish: Finish setup with app name "{appName}", currency {currency}, and {mainLanguage} as the primary language? Currency is permanent and can't be changed later, and {mainLanguage} becomes the permanent fallback for saved records (you can still change the display language afterward).
setup.enabledLocalesHint: Languages customers can switch to. The default language is always enabled.
setup.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
setup.errorPasswordMaxLength: Password must be at most 16 characters.
setup.errorPasswordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
setup.errorPasswordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
setup.errorPasswordDigit: Password must contain at least one digit.
setup.errorDefaultNotEnabled: The default language must be one of the enabled languages.
setup.errorEnabledEmpty: Select at least one enabled language.
setup.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
setup.alreadyCompleted: Setup already completed — please log in.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your restaurant name, currency, languages, and branding.
settings.appNameForPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the main-language name
settings.lockedAfterSetup: Set during setup · can't be changed
settings.errorSettingLocked: Currency and main language are fixed after setup and can't be changed.
settings.enabledLocalesHint: Languages customers can switch to. The default language is always enabled.
settings.themeApplyHint: This is a live preview. Save to apply the theme permanently — if you leave without saving, it reverts.
settings.logoR2Hint: Image upload is currently unavailable. Contact your system provider to enable it.
settings.saveSuccess: Saved — some changes apply on next page load.
settings.saveError: Failed to save settings. Please try again.
settings.logoUploadFailed: The logo didn't upload. Fix the image upload before saving, or remove it.
settings.soundSectionHint: Play a chime on this device when a new order arrives. This setting is per-device — each phone, tablet, or computer is configured separately.
settings.soundEnable: Play a sound for new orders
settings.soundEnableHint: Chimes on this device when an order comes in, as long as the dashboard is open.
settings.soundOverrideMute: Alert even when the device is muted
settings.soundOverrideMuteHint: On phones and tablets, still play the chime when the hardware mute switch is on. Recommended for a kitchen device.
settings.soundChooseHint: Tap a sound to select and preview it on this device.
settings.soundVolumeHint: Set the chime loudness on this device. Defaults to maximum for noisy environments.
settings.soundDeviceNote: Tip: keep the Order Dashboard open on the device that should ring. After reloading the page, you may need to tap once to re-enable sound — this is a browser requirement.

backup.title: Menu Backup & Restore
backup.description: Download a copy of your entire menu (categories, items, options, and all translations) as a file you can keep. If you ever mess up the menu while editing, restore that file to roll everything back. Backups cover the menu only — your orders and reports are never affected.
backup.downloadError: Could not create the backup. Please try again.
backup.restoreHint: Choose a backup file (.json) you downloaded earlier.
backup.confirmBody: This replaces your ENTIRE current menu with the backup file. Everything currently in your menu will be deleted and rebuilt from the file. Any items customers have added to their cart right now may be cleared. Your past orders and reports are safe. This cannot be undone.
backup.restoreDropped: Removed {count} translations for languages this restaurant no longer uses.
backup.restoreInvalidFile: That file isn't a valid menu backup.
backup.restoreInvalidPrice: The backup has a price that doesn't fit this restaurant's currency.
backup.restoreInvalidOptions: The backup has too many options on an item.
backup.restoreMissingCanonical: The backup has items with no name in this restaurant's main language. Re-export from the original restaurant, or add the missing names, then try again.
backup.restoreEmptyName: The backup has an item with no name at all. The file looks corrupted.
backup.restoreTooLarge: That backup file is too large to restore (over 10 MB). It may be corrupted.
backup.restoreError: Restore failed. Your menu was not changed.

settings.takeawayEnabledHint: Let staff place orders for pickup, with no table. Off by default.

dashboard.subtitle: Real-time order management
dashboard.botProtectionDisabled: Bot protection (CAPTCHA) is not configured for this deployment. Admin login works with rate limiting and password checks only.
dashboard.noAccess: You don't have access to any sections yet. Ask a superadmin to grant you permissions.
dashboard.confirmCollect: Mark this takeaway as collected and paid?

menuImport.duplicatesFound: {count, plural, one {# item already exists} other {# items already exist}} in your menu and have been deselected.
menuImport.priceConflictTooltip: This item had different prices across photos ({prices}). Kept {kept} — confirm or edit.
menuImport.reviewSummary: {total} items · {flagged} flagged for review · {ready} ready to publish
menuImport.marketPriceTooltip: This item has a market/seasonal price. Enter the actual price before saving.
menuImport.confirmDropUnpriced: {count, plural, one {# item has no price set and will be skipped} other {# items have no price set and will be skipped}}: {names}. Set a price to include {count, plural, one {it} other {them}}, or click OK to save without {count, plural, one {it} other {them}}.

categoryForm.translationRequired: At least one translation is required

reports.noItemsSold: No items sold in this range

reports.rangeTooLarge: Date range is too large — maximum 90 days
reports.noCategoryData: No category revenue data in this range
reports.noHourlyData: No hourly order data in this range
reports.steadyDayHint: No single rush — trade is spread through the day
reports.clockHourHint: All days in the range, summed by hour
reports.paretoNote: Your top {count} of {total} items make {percent}% of sales
reports.frequentlyTogetherHint: Items most often appearing in the same order
reports.noPairsData: Not enough multi-item orders to find clear pairs yet
reports.slowItemsHint: Items still on the menu selling the least — candidates to cut

orderHistory.noOrders: No orders found for this time range

reports.retentionNotice: Records older than 90 days are automatically removed. Download your report at the end of every month and keep the files for your yearly audit and tax records.

excel.truncatedDetail: Showing {shown} of {total} orders — narrow the date range for the complete record.

orderEntry.placedBody: Order for Table {number} sent to the kitchen.

errors.TABLE_NOT_FOUND: That table number isn't active. Check the number and try again.
errors.ITEM_UNAVAILABLE: An item is no longer available. The menu has been refreshed — review and try again.
errors.OPTION_UNAVAILABLE: An option is no longer available. The menu has been refreshed — review and try again.
errors.INVALID_OPTIONS: Some required choices are missing or invalid. Review the item's options and try again.
errors.PRICE_CHANGED: A price changed while you were ordering. The new total is {total}. Review and confirm again.
errors.SESSION_INACTIVE: That table's session just closed. Start the order again.
errors.ORDER_IN_PROGRESS: That order is already being placed. Please wait.
errors.SERVER_ERROR: Something went wrong placing the order. Please try again.

checkoutScanner.title: Checkout Scanner

checkoutScanner.confirmCloseTable: Close this table without checking out? {count, plural, =0 {The session will end and the table will be freed.} one {1 unpaid order will be cancelled, the session will end, and the table will be freed.} other {# unpaid orders will be cancelled, the session will end, and the table will be freed.}}
checkoutScanner.noConfirmableOrders: All orders on this table were declined, so there is nothing to check out. Close the table to free it.
checkoutScanner.noOrdersOnTable: This table has no orders yet, so there is nothing to check out. Close the table to free it.
checkoutScanner.alreadyCheckedOut: This session has already been checked out
checkoutScanner.errorSessionInactive: This session is no longer active.
checkoutScanner.errorOrdersPending: All orders must be confirmed before checkout.
checkoutScanner.errorNoConfirmed: There are no confirmed orders to check out.
checkoutScanner.errorAlreadyClosed: This table has already been closed.
checkoutScanner.pendingOrdersWarning: This table has {count, plural, one {1 pending order} other {# pending orders}}. Please go to the Dashboard to confirm orders before checkout.
